name: Canvas
description: Read-only Canvas tools backed by the local SQLite cache the server refreshes from the Canvas REST API.

auth.instructions: Generate a Canvas access token under Settings > Approved Integrations > New Access Token in Canvas.

tools.name: list_courses
tools.description: List the student's Canvas courses from the local cache.

tools.name: get_my_upcoming_assignments
tools.description: List upcoming assignments from the local cache.

tools.name: get_my_submission_status
tools.description: Show submitted, pending, and overdue assignments from the local cache.

tools.name: get_my_course_grades
tools.description: Show current Canvas grades from the local cache.

tools.name: get_my_todo_items
tools.description: List Canvas todo items from the local cache.

tools.name: get_my_peer_reviews_todo
tools.description: List peer reviews still owed by the student from the local cache.

tools.name: list_assignments
tools.description: List cached Canvas assignments, optionally filtered by course.

author: orbyt
